startLocation.address: Connaught Place, New Delhi, Delhi 110001, India

name: The Golden Triangle of India
summary: Explore the cultural heritage of Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur
description: Experience the magic of India's Golden Triangle. Marvel at the beauty of the Taj Mahal in Agra, explore the pink-hued palaces of Jaipur, and navigate the bustling historic markets of Old Delhi. A perfect introduction to India's rich history, vibrant colors, and majestic architecture with local culinary highlights.

name: The Historic Japan Heritage
summary: Immerse in Japanese history from Tokyo to ancient Kyoto
description: Journey through the contrasts of modern innovation and ancient tradition in Japan. Discover Tokyo's neon-lit neighborhoods and high-speed transit before escaping to the serene temples, bamboo groves, and traditional tea ceremonies of Kyoto. Witness the majestic Mount Fuji and soak in a relaxing natural hot spring on this premium tour.

name: The Italian Riviera & Alps
summary: Hike the colorful Cinque Terre and climb the Alpine slopes
description: A thrill-seeker's dream combining the spectacular, rugged coastal paths of the Italian Riviera with active hiking in the breathtaking Italian Alps. Traverse the iconic five villages of Cinque Terre by foot, sample world-class Genoese cuisine, and then travel north to conquer the stunning, high-altitude trails of the Dolomites.

name: The French Riviera & Provence
summary: Sun-drenched Mediterranean coast and lavender fields of Provence
description: Experience the epitome of southern French luxury and charm. Relax along the glamorous promenade of Nice, sail by the historic ramparts of Saint-Tropez, and venture inland to the spectacular lavender fields and Roman monuments of historic Avignon. Enjoy gourmet wine tastings and Michelin-star coastal cuisine.

name: The Nile River Valley Tour
summary: Cruise the historic Nile and marvel at ancient Pyramids
description: Step back in time to the land of the Pharaohs. Begin in Cairo at the iconic Giza Plateau, then cruise down the winding Nile River to the spectacular temples of Luxor and Karnak. Witness the colossal tombs of the Valley of the Kings and unwind under the desert sky on a traditional Egyptian Felucca.

startLocation.address: Spence St, Cairns City QLD 4870, Australia

name: The Great Barrier Reef Surf
summary: Snorkel the Great Barrier Reef and catch waves in Port Douglas
description: Explore the wonders of Tropical North Queensland. Sail on a luxury catamaran to snorkel the vibrant corals and meet the rich marine life of the outer Great Barrier Reef, then catch perfect waves off the coast of Port Douglas and explore the ancient Daintree Rainforest.

startLocation.address: Av. Eduardo Ribeiro, Centro, Manaus - AM, 69010-001, Brazil

name: The Amazon RainForest Trek
summary: Deep jungle survival hike and wildlife river cruise
description: Embark on a thrilling raw adventure in the heart of the Amazon. Travel deep into the jungle to learn wilderness survival skills from local indigenous guides, camp under the canopy, and enjoy a night river safari to observe caimans, jaguars, and unique nocturnal species. Truly an unforgettable expedition.
